name: Spam Hot Vegetable Salad Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed (7 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cut a thin slice from the top of each bun; set aside.
3. Remove the center from each bun, leaving a 1/2-inch wall.
4. Combine all remaining ingredients in a bowl.
5. Spoon the mixture into the buns, pressing firmly to pack.
6. Top with the reserved slices of buns.
7. Wrap each sandwich tightly in aluminum foil.
8. Bake for 20 minutes or until heated through and cheese is melted.
